description: State machine definition for the /one-to-n workflow

states.name: Clarification gates
states.instruction: Call AskUserQuestion with labeled options to capture scope boundary, backwards compatibility requirement, migration strategy, feature flag, deprecation window, tests-allowed-to-change, PR split strategy, merge target, rollback plan, and blast radius threshold before any code changes.
states.exit_condition: All intake clarification gates answered; scope, compat, and rollback posture locked in.

states.name: Enable terse mode
states.instruction: Run /caveman full to enable terse output mode for the session.
states.exit_condition: Caveman terse mode confirmed active.

states.name: Open session
states.instruction: Run /sessions to open or resume the current work session and record session metadata.
states.exit_condition: Session note created or resumed in vault.

states.name: Load prior context
states.instruction: Call mem_search to retrieve prior decisions, architecture choices, known bugs, and learnings relevant to this feature or module from Engram memory.
states.exit_condition: Prior Engram context loaded and summarized; relevant memories identified.

states.name: List repos
states.instruction: Call gitnexus_list_repos to enumerate all indexed repositories and confirm the target repo is indexed and fresh.
states.exit_condition: Target repo confirmed in GitNexus index; staleness checked.

states.name: Repo context
states.instruction: Call gitnexus_context on the target repo to get a codebase overview: symbol count, execution flows, functional clusters, and index freshness.
states.exit_condition: Codebase overview retrieved; symbol count and execution flows noted.

states.name: Route map + tool map
states.instruction: Call gitnexus_route_map and gitnexus_tool_map to map all API routes and tool definitions relevant to the feature scope.
states.exit_condition: Route map and tool map retrieved; entry points and API surface documented.

states.name: Update codemaps
states.instruction: Run /update-codemaps to regenerate stale codemaps so that subsequent exploration reflects the current state of the codebase.
states.exit_condition: Codemaps regenerated and confirmed fresh.

states.name: Parallel explore
states.instruction: Fork into three parallel exploration agents: callers/callees analysis, test coverage mapping, and recent commit history review.
states.exit_condition: All three exploration agents complete.

states.name: Explore callers and callees
states.instruction: Use gitnexus_context on symbols in the feature scope to map all callers, callees, and execution flow participation. Document the call graph boundary.
states.exit_condition: Caller/callee graph documented; execution flow participation mapped.

states.name: Explore tests
states.instruction: Map existing test coverage for the feature scope: identify which symbols have tests, which are untested, and what integration seams exist.
states.exit_condition: Test coverage map complete; untested symbols and seams identified.

states.name: Explore recent commits
states.instruction: Review recent commit history for the files in scope using git log to understand recent churn, co-change patterns, and ownership.
states.exit_condition: Recent commit history summarized; churn patterns and ownership noted.

states.name: Vault find
states.instruction: Run /vault-find to search the Obsidian Brain vault for prior notes, decisions, and related project content relevant to this feature.
states.exit_condition: Vault search results returned and summarized.

states.name: Impact per symbol
states.instruction: Run gitnexus_impact on each symbol in the feature scope with direction upstream. Report blast radius (direct callers, affected processes, risk level). Warn user if any symbol returns HIGH or CRITICAL risk.
states.exit_condition: Impact analysis complete for all in-scope symbols; risk levels documented.

states.name: API impact
states.instruction: Call gitnexus_api_impact to assess how the planned changes affect public API contracts, consumers, and downstream integrations.
states.exit_condition: API impact assessed; breaking changes and affected consumers identified.

states.name: Shape check
states.instruction: Call gitnexus_shape_check to verify that the planned interface changes are structurally compatible with existing call sites.
states.exit_condition: Shape check complete; incompatible call sites listed.

states.name: Detect changes + blast radius gate
states.instruction: Call gitnexus_detect_changes to enumerate all affected symbols and execution flows. If blast radius exceeds the user-confirmed threshold from B0, call AskUserQuestion to confirm proceed, scope-down, or abort.
states.exit_condition: Blast radius reviewed; user has confirmed proceed or scope adjusted.

states.name: Enter plan mode
states.instruction: Call EnterPlanMode to switch Claude Code into plan-only mode where no writes are executed.
states.exit_condition: Plan mode active; all subsequent steps are planning only until ExitPlanMode.

states.name: Multi-plan
states.instruction: Run /multi-plan to generate competing implementation plans from multiple model perspectives, incorporating the impact analysis and blast radius data from Phase 2.
states.exit_condition: Multi-plan output complete; competing plans synthesized into a ranked recommendation.

states.name: Parallel plan reviewers
states.instruction: Fork into three parallel planning review agents: planner for implementation plan, architect for system design, and security-reviewer for security posture.
states.exit_condition: All three planning review agents complete.

states.name: Planner agent
states.instruction: Invoke Agent(planner) to produce a detailed implementation plan covering phases, tasks, dependencies, risks, and migration steps.
states.exit_condition: Planner agent output complete with task list, phases, and risk register.

states.name: Architect agent
states.instruction: Invoke Agent(architect) to review the proposed changes against existing system design: component boundaries, data flow, API contracts, and persistence model.
states.exit_condition: Architect agent output complete with system design review and any structural concerns.

states.name: Security reviewer (plan)
states.instruction: Invoke Agent(security-reviewer) to audit the plan for auth/validation gaps, secrets exposure risks, and architectural security issues before any code is written.
states.exit_condition: Security review of plan complete; findings classified by severity; CONFIDENCE tag emitted.

states.name: Codex adversarial review (plan)
states.instruction: Run /codex:adversarial-review on the synthesized plan to get a GPT-5.4 second opinion, challenging assumptions and surfacing blind spots.
states.exit_condition: Adversarial review of plan complete; challenges and blind spots documented.

states.name: Exit plan mode
states.instruction: Present the synthesized plan to the user via AskUserQuestion. On approval, call ExitPlanMode to leave plan-only mode and allow write operations to proceed.
states.exit_condition: User has approved the plan; plan mode exited; write operations re-enabled.

states.name: Save plan milestone
states.instruction: Call mem_save to persist the approved plan, impact analysis results, architecture decisions, and migration strategy to Engram memory.
states.exit_condition: Plan milestone saved to Engram with topic key and structured What/Why/Where/Learned content.

states.name: TDD at integration seams
states.instruction: Run /tdd to enter the test-driven development workflow. Write failing tests at integration seams identified in Phase 1 before any implementation code.
states.exit_condition: Failing integration seam tests written and confirmed RED.

states.name: Stack testing skill
states.instruction: Load the framework-specific testing skill for the chosen stack (pytest, vitest, go test, cargo test, etc.) to apply idiomatic test patterns.
states.exit_condition: Framework-specific testing skill loaded and test runner verified.

states.name: Property-based tests
states.instruction: Write property-based tests for data transformations, validation logic, serialization, and invariants in the feature scope using hypothesis/fast-check/proptest/gopter as appropriate.
states.exit_condition: Property-based tests written for all applicable invariants; running and failing RED.

states.name: Contract tests for blast-radius calls
states.instruction: Write contract tests for all d=1 (WILL BREAK) call sites identified by gitnexus_impact in B10. Ensure each direct caller has a test that verifies the existing contract before any changes.
states.exit_condition: Contract tests written for all d=1 blast-radius call sites; confirmed RED or GREEN as baseline.

states.name: RED gate
states.instruction: Run the full test suite and confirm that all new tests written in B19-B21 are RED (failing). Present results to user for confirmation before proceeding to implementation.
states.exit_condition: User has confirmed RED gate: all new tests are failing as expected before implementation begins.

states.name: AgentDiet context brief
states.instruction: Classify all Phase 0-4 outputs as KEEP, SUMMARIZE, or DROP per AgentDiet rules. Compress trajectory to reduce input tokens 40-60% before passing context to execution agents.
states.exit_condition: Context brief computed; trajectory compressed and ready to pass to execution phase.

states.name: Multi-execute workers
states.instruction: Run /multi-execute with N workers to implement the approved plan in parallel. Orchestrator manages internal parallelism across Haiku worker agents.
states.exit_condition: All multi-execute workers complete; implementation merged and tests passing GREEN.

states.name: Multi-backend
states.instruction: Run /multi-backend to apply backend-specific execution patterns (API design, database access, service layer) for backend-heavy feature work.
states.exit_condition: Backend execution patterns applied; backend implementation complete.

states.name: Multi-frontend
states.instruction: Run /multi-frontend to apply frontend-specific execution patterns (component design, state management, accessibility) for frontend-heavy feature work.
states.exit_condition: Frontend execution patterns applied; frontend implementation complete.

states.name: Write-time skills auto-fire
states.instruction: Confirm write-time skills are active: semgrep SAST hook runs on every Write/Edit, coding standards enforced, immutability patterns checked. Address any semgrep findings before proceeding.
states.exit_condition: All write-time skill hooks have fired; semgrep findings addressed; code conforms to coding standards.

states.name: Refactor clean
states.instruction: Run /refactor-clean to remove dead code, extract modules exceeding 150 LOC, eliminate duplication, and enforce file size limits.
states.exit_condition: Dead code removed; files under 150 LOC; no duplication flagged.

states.name: Lint + verify
states.instruction: Run lint and /verify to execute linter, type checker, and test suite. Confirm clean baseline before review phase.
states.exit_condition: Lint, types, and tests all pass with zero errors.

states.name: Stack verification skill
states.instruction: Load and run the framework-specific verification skill (e.g., django-verification, springboot-verification) to apply stack-idiomatic verification checks.
states.exit_condition: Stack verification skill checks complete; all framework-specific checks pass.

states.name: Test coverage
states.instruction: Run /test-coverage to measure test coverage across changed files. Must reach 80% minimum before proceeding.
states.exit_condition: Test coverage at or above 80% on changed files.

states.name: Mutation testing
states.instruction: Run mutation testing on changed files only using Stryker/mutmut/cargo-mutants/go-mutesting. Target 60%+ mutation score. Strengthen weak tests before proceeding.
states.exit_condition: Mutation score on changed files is 60% or above; weak tests strengthened.

states.name: E2E tests
states.instruction: Run /e2e to execute end-to-end tests covering critical user flows affected by this feature change.
states.exit_condition: E2E tests pass for all affected critical user flows.

states.name: Build fix
states.instruction: Run /build-fix using the build-error-resolver agent to diagnose and fix any remaining build failures incrementally.
states.exit_condition: Build passes clean with zero errors.

states.name: Security review
states.instruction: Invoke Agent(security-reviewer) to audit auth changes, crypto usage, input validation, and architectural security. Apply escalation triggers per performance.md if CRITICAL findings are present.
states.exit_condition: Security review complete; all findings classified by severity; CONFIDENCE tag emitted.

states.name: Language review
states.instruction: Run a language-specific reviewer agent to audit idiomatic usage, anti-patterns, performance pitfalls, and style conformance. Apply escalation triggers from B32 if active.
states.exit_condition: Language review complete; idiomatic issues and anti-patterns documented; CONFIDENCE tag emitted.

states.name: Database review
states.instruction: Invoke Agent(database-reviewer) to audit schema changes, migration safety, query efficiency, index coverage, and N+1 patterns. Apply escalation triggers if active.
states.exit_condition: Database review complete; schema and query findings documented; CONFIDENCE tag emitted.

states.name: Codex adversarial review (pre-commit)
states.instruction: Run /codex:adversarial-review for a final GPT-5.4 pre-commit pass on the implementation. Surface any remaining blind spots or regressions.
states.exit_condition: Codex adversarial review complete; findings documented.

states.name: Merge reviewer outputs
states.instruction: Deduplicate and merge findings from B32, B33, B34, and B35. Classify by severity (CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW). Apply escalation triggers. Present unified findings to user and apply selected fixes.
states.exit_condition: Unified findings list produced; severity rankings assigned; CRITICAL and HIGH issues resolved.

states.name: Caveman review
states.instruction: Run /caveman-review to get a final human-readable diff summary, confirming the changeset matches the intended scope before committing.
states.exit_condition: Caveman review complete; diff summary confirmed matching intended scope.

states.name: Update codemaps
states.instruction: Run /update-codemaps to regenerate codemaps reflecting the new implementation so the index is fresh for future sessions.
states.exit_condition: Codemaps updated and confirmed fresh after implementation.

states.name: Update docs
states.instruction: Run /update-docs and invoke Agent(doc-updater) to update README, API docs, architecture overview, and any affected inline documentation.
states.exit_condition: Documentation updated to reflect new feature; doc-updater agent complete.

states.name: Detect changes (pre-commit)
states.instruction: Call gitnexus_detect_changes to verify the final changeset only affects expected symbols and execution flows before committing.
states.exit_condition: Change detection confirms scope matches intent; no unexpected symbols affected.

states.name: Commit
states.instruction: Run /caveman-commit to show diff to user, stage files, and create a conventional commit with a descriptive message following the git-workflow format.
states.exit_condition: Commit created with passing pre-commit hooks and conventional commit message.

states.name: Create PR
states.instruction: Run gh pr create to open a pull request with a comprehensive summary, test plan, blast radius notes, migration notes, and any skipped step notes in the PR body.
states.exit_condition: PR created on GitHub; PR URL returned to user.

states.name: Checkpoint
states.instruction: Run /checkpoint to snapshot the current session state including completed steps, open decisions, and any deferred work.
states.exit_condition: Checkpoint snapshot saved and resumable.

states.name: Save learnings
states.instruction: Call mem_save to persist the final architecture decisions, patterns used, blast radius findings, and key learnings with structured What/Why/Where/Learned format.
states.exit_condition: Learnings and decisions saved to Engram with appropriate topic key.

states.name: Vault session
states.instruction: Run /vault-session to write or update the session note in the Obsidian Brain vault with session summary, links to relevant notes, and project reference.
states.exit_condition: Vault session note written with YAML frontmatter and session content.

states.name: Learn eval
states.instruction: Run /learn to evaluate what patterns, decisions, and learnings from this session are worth encoding as new or updated skills.
states.exit_condition: Learn eval complete; skill candidates identified and density scores computed.

states.name: Evolve skills
states.instruction: Run /evolve --generate to propose new skill definitions for high-density patterns identified in learn eval. Present to user for approval before saving.
states.exit_condition: User has approved or rejected proposed skill evolution; approved skills saved.

states.name: Session summary
states.instruction: Call mem_session_summary to write the end-of-session summary to Engram, capturing what was changed, impact analysis results, decisions made, and what to revisit next session.
states.exit_condition: Session summary saved to Engram. Workflow complete.
